'''dagazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jwlr|jwlr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jwlr|jwlr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dagazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dægæzhæth|dægæzhæth]] || [[word:dægæzhæj|dægæzhæj]] || [[word:dægæzhæsh|dægæzhæsh]] || [[word:dægæzhæ|dægæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dagagazhath|dagagazhath]] || [[word:dagagazhaj|dagagazhaj]] || [[word:dagagazhash|dagagazhash]] || [[word:dagagazha|dagagazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dagazhath|dagazhath]] || [[word:dagazhaj|dagazhaj]] || [[word:dagazhash|dagazhash]] || [[word:dagazha|dagazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dagafzhath|dagafzhath]] || [[word:dagafzhaj|dagafzhaj]] || [[word:dagafzhash|dagafzhash]] || [[word:dagafzhaf|dagafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dagazhatha|dagazhatha]] || [[word:dagazhaja|dagazhaja]] || [[word:dagazhasha|dagazhasha]] || [[word:dagazhaka|dagazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dagazhath|dagazhath]] || [[word:dagazhaj|dagazhaj]] || [[word:dagazhash|dagazhash]] || [[word:dagazha|dagazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dagazhathal|dagazhathal]] || [[word:dagazhajal|dagazhajal]] || [[word:dagazhashal|dagazhashal]] || [[word:dagazhakal|dagazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dagazhathatha|dagazhathatha]] || [[word:dagazhajaja|dagazhajaja]] || [[word:dagazhashasha|dagazhashasha]] || [[word:dagazhaka|dagazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dagazhathan|dagazhathan]] || [[word:dagazhajan|dagazhajan]] || [[word:dagazhashan|dagazhashan]] || [[word:dagazhakan|dagazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dagazhathaoro|dagazhathaoro]] || [[word:dagazhajaoro|dagazhajaoro]] || [[word:dagazhashaoro|dagazhashaoro]] || [[word:dagazhakaoro|dagazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
